===================
Richmond Mosque
Richmond, Virginia
21 October 1990

Lineage:  trade cdrs > flac via eac (secure mode) > tlh

Disc One
1. Dixie (Daniel Decatur Emmett)
2. Subterranean Homesick Blues
3. I'll Remember You
4. Ballad Of A Thin Man
5. Gotta Serve Somebody						
6. Masters Of War
7. Joey
8. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
9. Gates Of Eden
10. Desolation Row

Disc Two 
1. It Ain't Me, Babe
2. Wiggle Wiggle
3. Shooting Star
4. All Along The Watchtower
5. I Believe In You
6. Like A Rolling Stone
7. The Times They Are A-Changin'
8. Highway 61 Revisited
